languages.text:
Allies that go through the energy wall receive {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} bonus MP (once per round).
Enemies that go through the energy wall are dealt {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} to {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} Shock damage.

traits.locale_text:
Allies that go through the energy wall receive {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} bonus MP (once per round).
Enemies that go through the energy wall are dealt {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} to {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} Shock damage.

languages.text:
Allies that move through cells occupied by the energy wall gain +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} MP (once per round).
Enemies that pass through the energy wall suffer {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (up to a maximum of {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) shock damage.

traits.locale_text:
Allies that move through cells occupied by the energy wall gain +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} MP (once per round).
Targets that pass through the energy wall must pass a Willpower resistance test with a −{uip|SavingThrow|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} penalty or become stunned for 1 round.

Allies that move through cells occupied by the energy wall gain +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} MP (once per round).
Enemies that pass through the energy wall suffer {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (up to a maximum of {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) shock damage.

Allies that move through cells occupied by the energy wall gain +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} MP (once per round).
Enemies that pass through the energy wall suffer {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (up to a maximum of {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) shock damage.

languages.text:
Союзники, проходящие через клетки, которые занимает энергетическая стена, получают +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} (один раз за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}).
Противники, перемещающиеся сквозь энергетическую стену, получают +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (но не более {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) электрического урона.

Противники, перемещающиеся сквозь энергетическую стену, получают +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (но не более {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) электрического урона.

Союзники, проходящие через клетки, которые занимает энергетическая стена, получают +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} (один раз за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}).
Противники, перемещающиеся сквозь энергетическую стену, получают +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (но не более {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) электрического урона.

languages.text:
Los aliados que atraviesan casillas ocupadas por el muro de energía ganan +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} PM (una vez por asalto).
Los enemigos que atraviesen el muro de energía sufren {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (hasta un máximo de {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) de daño de conmoción.

Enemies that pass through the energy wall suffer {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (up to a maximum of {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) shock damage.

languages.text:
Verbündete, die Felder mit einer Energiewand passieren, erhalten (einmal pro Runde) +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} BP.
Gegner, die die Energiewand passieren, erleiden {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (max. {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) Schockschaden.
languages.original_text:

traits.locale_text:
Verbündete, die Felder mit einer Energiewand passieren, erhalten (einmal pro Runde) +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} BP.
Gegner, die die Energiewand passieren, erleiden {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (max. {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) Schockschaden.

languages.text:
Les alliés qui traversent les cases occupées par le mur d'énergie gagnent +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} PD (une fois par round).
Les ennemis qui traversent le mur d'énergie subissent {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} points de dégâts d'électrocution, jusqu'à un maximum de {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}.

Allies that move through cells occupied by the energy wall gain +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} MP (once per round).

traits.locale_text:
Les alliés qui traversent les cases occupées par le mur d'énergie gagnent +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} PD (une fois par round).

languages.text:
Enerji duvarının kapladığı hücrelerden geçen dost birimler, +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} HP kazanır (her rauntta bir kez).
Enerji duvarından geçen düşmanlar, {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (Maksimum {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) şok hasarına maruz kalır.
languages.original_text:
Allies that move through cells occupied by the energy wall gain +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} MP (once per round).
Enemies that pass through the energy wall suffer {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (up to a maximum of {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) shock damage.

traits.locale_text:
Enerji duvarının kapladığı hücrelerden geçen dost birimler, +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} HP kazanır (her rauntta bir kez).
Enerji duvarından geçen düşmanlar, {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (Maksimum {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) şok hasarına maruz kalır.

languages.text:
盟友穿过能量墙所占据的格子时，获得{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}点移动点数（每轮一次）。
敌人穿过能量墙时，受到{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}（最高不超过{uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}）点电击伤害。
languages.original_text:
Allies that move through cells occupied by the energy wall gain +{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} MP (once per round).
Enemies that pass through the energy wall suffer {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (up to a maximum of {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) shock damage.

traits.locale_text:
盟友穿过能量墙所占据的格子时，获得{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}点移动点数（每轮一次）。
敌人穿过能量墙时，受到{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}（最高不超过{uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}）点电击伤害。

languages.text:
エネルギーの壁が占めるマスを通過する味方は、+{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}のMPを得る（ラウンドにつき1回）。
エネルギーの壁を通り抜ける敵は、{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}（最大{uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}まで）のショックダメージを受ける。

Enemies that pass through the energy wall suffer {uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c} (up to a maximum of {uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}) shock damage.

traits.locale_text:
エネルギーの壁が占めるマスを通過する味方は、+{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}のMPを得る（ラウンドにつき1回）。
エネルギーの壁を通り抜ける敵は、{uip|BonusMP|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}（最大{uip|MaxDamage|52fe1454f6054f119ddafd9941b3950c}まで）のショックダメージを受ける。
